'''uch''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:liver|liver]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ?-ch-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liver|liver]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || ?æchi?ith || ?æchi?ij || ?æchi?ish || ?æchi?i
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ?achuchu?uth || ?achuchu?uj || ?achuchu?ush || ?achuchu?u
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ?achu?uth || ?achu?uj || ?achu?ush || ?achu?u
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ?achuf?ufth || ?achuf?ufj || ?achuf?ufsh || ?achuf?uf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ?æche?eth || ?æche?ej || ?æche?esh || ?æche?e
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ?achocho?oth || ?achocho?oj || ?achocho?osh || ?achocho?o
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ?acho?oth || ?acho?oj || ?acho?osh || ?acho?o
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ?achof?ofth || ?achof?ofj || ?achof?ofsh || ?achof?of
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || ?achïf?ïfth || ?achïf?ïfj || ?achïf?ïfsh || ?achïf?ïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || ?achïfchïf?ïfth || ?achïfchïf?ïfj || ?achïfchïf?ïfsh || ?achïfchïf?ïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ?æchæ?æth || ?æchæ?æj || ?æchæ?æsh || ?æchæ?æ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ?achacha?ath || ?achacha?aj || ?achacha?ash || ?achacha?a
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ?acha?ath || ?acha?aj || ?acha?ash || ?acha?a
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ?achaf?afth || ?achaf?afj || ?achaf?afsh || ?achaf?af
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ?acha?atha || ?acha?aja || ?acha?asha || ?acha?aka
|-
| [[Patient]] || ?acha?ath || ?acha?aj || ?acha?ash || ?acha?a
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ?acha?athal || ?acha?ajal || ?acha?ashal || ?acha?akal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ?acha?aathatha || ?acha?aajaja || ?acha?aashasha || ?acha?aaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || ?acha?athan || ?acha?ajan || ?acha?ashan || ?acha?akan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ?acha?athaoro || ?acha?ajaoro || ?acha?ashaoro || ?acha?akaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Irregular words]]
[[Category:Words 66806d6]]
[[Category:words 8d63c8d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|29134ca}}
